# OpenAI-compatible API Doctor

> Vendor-neutral production diagnosis for endpoint, authentication, model, rate-limit and upstream failures.

## Primary use

- Run `tools/aifast_api_doctor.py` before changing several client settings at once.
- The CLI reads the key from an environment variable and rejects plaintext `--api-key` input.
- JSON reports retain timestamps, status codes, request IDs, response models, elapsed time and visible usage.
- 401/403/404 are configuration failures; 429 and 5xx require bounded retry policies.
- Platform route failover and application-level model fallback are separate decisions.

## Entry points

- Full troubleshooting context: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china/blob/main/llms-full.txt
- Tool source: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china/tree/main/tools
- Online model and protocol check: https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/
- Client setup guide: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide
- AIFast claims and evidence: https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/evidence/
- Current console: https://www.aifast.club

The tool diagnoses the evidence visible at the API boundary. It does not certify the underlying model identity or establish a long-term SLA.
